summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stock Dashboard implementation with 6 backend APIs and frontend integration. All core features working correctly including role-based access and auto-refresh functionality.

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Stock Dashboard APIs working correctly as alternative
Not critical for Stock Dashboard functionality

passed_tests: Stock Summary API - all required fields present
Stock Aging API - aging buckets working
Slow Moving Stock API - slow/non-moving data available
Bin Utilization API - zone summary and overall utilization
FIFO Alerts API - FIFO materials tracking
Material Stock API - top materials by stock
Stock Dashboard loads with all summary cards
Stock by Status pie chart displays correctly
Bin Utilization shows occupied vs empty bins with percentage
Stock by Category pie chart displays
Stock Aging Analysis bar chart shows age buckets (0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days)
Alerts tab shows Understock, Overstock, and Slow/Non-Moving items
Bin Zones tab shows zone-wise utilization table
Top Materials tab shows top 10 materials by stock
FIFO Status tab shows FIFO materials with pending stock
Management Viewer sees Stock Dashboard as homepage (not regular dashboard)
Refresh button updates dashboard data
Auto-refresh works (every 30 seconds) - verified time update from 12:24:16 AM to 12:24:46 AM
Role-based access control - Management Viewer restricted from operational pages
All tabs clickable and functional
Real-time data display with proper formatting
Charts and visualizations rendering correctly
